'''DFS-1104''' was a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighter]] assigned to the [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']].

==Behind the scenes==
The image used to represent DFS-1104 is a frame captured from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] which was slightly augmented by artists at [[Decipher]] The same frame was also used to represent [[DFS-1308]].
